title: Why building under regulation is an advantage for European founders
summary:
When I joined N26 as CTO, my first real job had nothing to do with building an app. I was asked to help get a banking licence and build up a core banking system from scratch. I had never worked in finance and had never sat across from a regulator. For months the work felt […]

The post Why building under regulation is an advantage for European founders appeared first on EU-Startups.
